title: Orchestrator advisor path plumbing: advisor_ref field + CLI verb + Gate 3 precondition (AO3/AO13)
action: Per plan.md 'Slice 4 design settled at planning (2026-07-17)' items 1-3+5 and AO3/AO13 (CONTEXT.md, quoted verbatim there): (1) state.mjs — export advisorRefAnchors(root) -> {feature, newest_decision_id, plan_sha256} (newest active decision id from the decision log's active set; sha256 of docs/history/<state.feature>/plan.md, missing file -> 'absent' sentinel; pure reads, never throws) and advisorRefStale(root, ref, state) -> {stale: bool, reasons: []} implementing AO13 verbatim: feature mismatch; newest active decision id changed; plan sha256 changed; ref.consulted_at predates state.gate_revoked_at?.execution. Byte-mirror .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs. (2) bee.mjs (canonical skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs, byte-mirror .bee/bin/bee.mjs) — new verbs: 'state advisor-ref record --advisor <identity> --digest-file <path>' (refuses when phase is idle/compounding-complete or no feature; stamps consulted_at + anchors ITSELF via advisorRefAnchors — caller never supplies anchors; stores digest_head = first 500 chars of the digest file; lane-aware via resolveMutationTarget like gates, with anchors bound to the SAME selected record the verb mutates — a lane record's feature and THAT feature's plan.md, never unconditionally the default record's (checker M1)) and 'state advisor-ref show'. Register both in lib/command-registry.mjs (checker B1: the manifest lives THERE, not in bee.mjs — bee.mjs only maps handlers via COMMAND_REGISTRY at ~2536, and resolveCommand longest-prefix-matches the registry at ~2399-2408, so an unregistered 3-token verb resolves to no handler; edit skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/command-registry.mjs AND keep .bee/bin/lib/command-registry.mjs byte-identical — test_lib_mirror enforces it) with parameter schemas, then map the handlers in bee.mjs. (3) handleStateGate (templates/bee.mjs:1050) — when name==='execution' AND approved===true AND the SELECTED record's mode==='high-risk': compute advisorRefStale; missing or stale -> THROW (never warn) naming each stale reason and a FIX spelling the consult flow (resolve the advisor from config, run it read-only with the evidence bundle on stdin, then bee state advisor-ref record). When approved===false for execution: stamp state.gate_revoked_at = {...state.gate_revoked_at, execution: now}. All other gates, modes, and writes untouched. (4) Tests — test_bee_cli.mjs rows: record refuses with no active feature; record stamps anchors + digest_head; show round-trips; high-risk execution+true THROWS without ref; passes with fresh ref; each of the four AO13 conditions individually flips it stale (feature change, new active decision, plan.md edit, execution revocation after consult); non-high-risk mode unaffected; other gates unaffected; malformed advisor_ref in state (hand-corrupted fixture) reads as missing, never crashes the gate verb. test_lib.mjs: EXPECTED_STATE_EXPORTS gains the two new exports (declared up front per learning Addendum 3) + mirrors synced. FINAL STEP: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then the cell verify — --check green.

truths: high-risk execution approval THROWS on missing/stale advisor_ref, naming each AO13 reason; fresh ref passes
each AO13 staleness condition is individually covered by a test row
anchors are stamped by the verb, never accepted from the caller
execution revocation stamps gate_revoked_at.execution; a ref older than it is stale
non-high-risk modes and the other three gates are byte-untouched in behavior
malformed/corrupt advisor_ref never crashes a verb (reads as missing)
both new verbs appear in the --help --json manifest with schemas
bee.mjs and state.mjs mirrors byte-identical; test_lib export census updated with mirrors
artifacts: a sample thrown Gate 3 refusal message quoted in the report
prohibitions: no TTL or time-based staleness (AO13 bans it)
no mid-flight blocking (worker close point stays [BLOCKED], untouched)
no edits outside bounded files (release-manifest.json only via release_manifest.mjs --write)

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: advisor_ref plumbing (AO3/AO13): state.mjs helpers advisorRefAnchors/advisorRefStale + ADVISOR_PLAN_ABSENT_SENTINEL; CLI verbs state advisor-ref record/show (verb-stamped anchors bound to the selected record, never caller-supplied); Gate 3 precondition in handleStateGate — high-risk execution+true throws on missing/stale ref naming each AO13 reason, approved=false stamps gate_revoked_at.execution. Registered in command-registry (both copies) + handler map + state usage fallback. All mirrors byte-identical; export census + release manifest synced.
trace.verify_output: test_bee_cli: 159 passed, 0 failed | test_lib: 342 passed, 0 failed | test_lib_mirror: PASS templates/lib<->.bee/bin/lib byte-identical (19 files) + hook inventory | split_brain: TARGET met (blocked_downgrade, zero_mutation=true) | release_manifest --check: 146 file(s) match stored manifest
trace.verify_command: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
